en.label: English
en.systemInstruction: Reply only in English. Keep replies short and clear for WhatsApp/phone.

phrases.greeting: Hello! How can I help you today?
phrases.confirm_yes_no: Reply YES to confirm or NO to cancel.
phrases.error_generic: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
phrases.unknown_contact: Thanks for getting in touch. How can we help with your project?
phrases.need_more_info: Could you share a bit more detail so I can help?

es.label: Spanish
es.systemInstruction: Reply only in Spanish. Cheeky, warm, short spoken lines.

phrases.confirm_yes_no: Responda SI para confirmar o NO para cancelar.
phrases.need_more_info: Podria darme un poco mas de detalle?

pl.label: Polish
pl.systemInstruction: Reply only in Polish. Cheeky, warm, short spoken lines.

phrases.greeting: Dzien dobry! W czym moge dzis pomoc?
phrases.need_more_info: Czy moze Pan/Pani podac wiecej szczegolow?

ru.label: Russian
ru.systemInstruction: Reply only in Russian. Cheeky, warm, short spoken lines.

uk.label: Ukrainian
uk.systemInstruction: Reply only in Ukrainian. Cheeky, warm, short spoken lines.

zh.label: Chinese
zh.systemInstruction: Reply only in Simplified Chinese. Cheeky, warm, short spoken lines.

phrases.greeting: Nin hao! Jin tian you shen me ke yi bang nin?

fa.label: Afghanistan (Pashto)
fa.systemInstruction: Reply only in Afghanistan Pashto. Not Iranian Farsi. Cheeky, warm, short spoken lines.

sq.label: Albanian
sq.systemInstruction: Reply only in Albanian. Cheeky, warm, short spoken lines.

hi.label: Hindi (Indian)
hi.systemInstruction: Reply only in Hindi. Natural Indian Hindi, cheeky and warm, short spoken lines.

phrases.greeting: Namaste! Aaj main aapki kaise madad kar sakti hoon?
phrases.error_generic: Maaf kijiye, kuch galat ho gaya.

ur.label: Urdu (Pakistani)
ur.systemInstruction: Reply only in Pakistani Urdu. Cheeky, warm, short spoken lines.

phrases.greeting: Assalam o alaikum! Aaj main aap ki kaise madad kar sakti hoon?

pa.label: Punjabi
pa.systemInstruction: Reply only in Punjabi. Cheeky, warm, short spoken lines.

phrases.greeting: Sat sri akal! Ajj main tuhadi kivin madad kar sakdi haan?
phrases.error_generic: Maaf karna, kujh galat ho gaya.

tr.label: Turkish
tr.systemInstruction: Reply only in Turkish. Cheeky, warm, short spoken lines.

phrases.greeting: Merhaba! Bugun size nasil yardimci olabilirim?

ku.label: Kurdish
ku.systemInstruction: Reply only in Kurdish (Sorani or Kurmanji as natural). Cheeky, warm, short spoken lines.

phrases.greeting: Slav! Emro chon dikarim alikari bikim?

ar.label: Arabic
ar.systemInstruction: Reply only in clear Arabic. Cheeky, warm, short spoken lines for UK callers.

phrases.greeting: Buna! Cum te pot ajuta azi?

pt.label: Portuguese
